name: Storming the Gate of Ravensgate
description: Ravensgate's iron-banded gate looms overhead, manned by men-at-arms loyal to Lord Ashwick's steward. Arrows whistle from the murder-holes and the portcullis rattles on its chains. To pass, you must fight through the gatehouse or fall trying.
failureConsequence: The garrison repels your assault and bars the gate. You retreat under a hail of stones, nursing bruises and a wounded pride.
